query: SELECT id, title, category FROM timeline_events ORDER BY event_date LIMIT 75 OFFSET 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2N1WTErRdSjheBh.e46440e12186 --database 3yhU3DrKzf8Z5BNtvxatFF --execute SELECT id, title, category FROM timeline_events ORDER BY event_date LIMIT 75 OFFSET 30;
